name: ferreteria-los-puentes
description: Sistema Administrativo y POS - Ferretería Los Puentes

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @flp/database generate && pnpm --filter @flp/database build && pnpm --filter @flp/shared build && pnpm -r build
scripts.build:api: pnpm --filter @flp/database generate && pnpm --filter @flp/database build && pnpm --filter @flp/shared build && pnpm --filter @flp/api build
scripts.build:web: pnpm --filter @flp/database generate && pnpm --filter @flp/shared build && pnpm --filter @flp/web build
scripts.start:api:render: pnpm db:push && pnpm db:seed && pnpm start:api
